title: Binary Search, Selection, and Boundary Finding · Execution Trace: Quickselect
summary: Locate inventory thresholds and percentiles without off-by-one failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa quickselect increment in a boundary-safe search and selection toolkit. objectives: Trace partition-based selection and distinguish expected from worst-case cost.

content.code:
# Worked focus: dsa-quickselect — Trace partition-based selection and distinguish expected from worst-case cost.
def lower_bound(values: list[int], target: int) -> int:
    low, high = 0, len(values)
    while low < high:
        middle = (low + high) // 2
        if values[middle] < target: low = middle + 1
        else: high = middle
    assert all(value < target for value in values[:low])
    return low
